title: Landmark hook
_note: An optional rumour/secret seed (appears ~half the time) — a light bridge toward the Hooks and small-oracle phases. Full sentences with their own terminal punctuation.

entries.value: Locals leave offerings at its foot and won't say why.
They say it marks where something lies buried.
Travellers use it to find their way for miles.
A rumour places a hidden cache somewhere near.
Something is said to nest within it.
Folk swear the dead walk here on certain nights.
An old road, now lost, once ran past it.
Those who camp beneath it report strange dreams.
